title: Creamtip's Paintings
description: Adds a few paintings to enhance the look of your next base!
body:
Adds state of the art paintings to minecraft including but not limited to clickbait thumbnails![Clickbait Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e84e60c3b76564904f41a5f902358a2166bb6af_0.webp)
Massive Paintings!
![Sample of a Massive Painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21e7265b2215805535358f1ac484dd2e76a6220f_0.webp)
And many more to enhance the looks of your next (massive) minecraft build!
